HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS A2 ACADEMY LLC, KATHRYN THOMAS, STEPHEN JOHNSTON, and ARNOLD WHITMAN's Motion For Leave To File Third Amended Complaint.

Matter argued and submitted. The court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiffs' motion for leave to file a third amended complaint is granted. Plaintiffs may file their "updated" proposed third amended complaint no later than April 27, 2026. With the deletion of paragraph 58 in the earlier version of the proposed third amended complaint, the updated proposed third amended complaint is no longer inconsistent with the order filed July 10, 2025. Defendants have not shown either prejudice to them if plaintiffs were granted leave to file a third amended complaint or excessive delay by plaintiffs in seeking to file a third amended complaint. Nor have defendants shown that the third amended complaint is a sham pleading. All of defendants' arguments directed to the sufficiency of the third amended complaint are more properly raised in a pleading motion such as a demurrer or a motion to strike rather than in opposition to a motion to amend.

Order signed.
